component.name: MetaDrop
component.summary: Inspect and remove privacy-sensitive file metadata

description.p: MetaDrop is a native Linux utility for reviewing metadata before creating a sanitized copy.
It processes files locally, follows the system Qt theme, and verifies every cleaned result before saving it.

ul.li: Inspect EXIF, IPTC, XMP, audio tags, PDF document information, and office metadata.
Highlight location, identity, device, timestamp, and persistent identifier risks.
Clean batches without overwriting source files.

description.p: Add persistent, immediate interface switching between English, Russian, Ukrainian and German.
Add a clean-built Arch Linux package and installation checks for every binary format.
Rebuild the RPM natively on Fedora 44 and verify dependency resolution before release.
Unified native packages, centered application identity and standardized project documentation.
New application identity, four README languages and expanded native Linux packaging.
Regenerate PDF file identifiers and harden release packaging.
